label: List all applications
cypher: MATCH (a:Application) RETURN a.name AS application ORDER BY a.name

label: How many applications per domain?
cypher: MATCH (d:Domain)-[:CONTAINS]->(a:Application) RETURN d.name AS domain, count(a) AS apps ORDER BY apps DESC

label: Which applications have the most dependencies?
cypher: MATCH (a:Application)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(d) RETURN a.name AS application, count(d) AS dependencies ORDER BY dependencies DESC LIMIT 10

label: Show all application dependencies
cypher: MATCH (a:Application)-[:DEPENDS_ON]->(b) RETURN a.name AS application, b.name AS depends_on ORDER BY a.name, b.name

label: What domains exist?
cypher: MATCH (d:Domain) RETURN d.name AS domain ORDER BY d.name
